title: DecoNature
description: Decocraft Nature adds beautiful plants and nature-related content to your Minecraft world.
body: ![Keyart for decocraft showing the logo and some of the plants included in the mod.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8371f20b41a7cb0bf873ef5a317ddee13ac385fc.png) ## It's your turn now Minecraft gardeners and landscape artists! Tired of barren landscapes or cookie-cutter gardens? Decocraft Nature brings life to your Minecraft builds with hundreds of lush plants, intricate outdoor decorations, and stylish potted greenery. Enhance, beautify, and decorate your build exteriors! Tons of different plants, fungi, trees, colorful flower-filled gardens, rustic cottage core vibes. Water plants, climbing ivys, cacti and other desert flora. Don't just decorate the inside! ![Panorama shot of some of the decorations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecbe6f4997a1ca86a9fd940e6fc5e071d9f82834.jpeg) ## Recipes ### Sprouting Table Crafting Recipe (make raw material used in crafting) ![Sprouting Table Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c18d199cbf4a3106947420935b9a3026a624c73.png) ### Nature Bench Crafting Recipe (craft your decorative plants and items here) ![Nature Bench Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ba3dc4697e292ddaccefbbb592b65d009b15f99.png) ### Hedge Clippers Crafting Recipe (used for changing the shape of some plants) ![Hedge Clippers Crafting Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f50bf138919a16936fba671f65b203297eb3882.png) ### Bio Material (Input any Seeds, Logs or Cobblestone, then add Bonemeal as fuel and press START to craft your Bio Material) ![Bio Material Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c0f104aaac976966a3d6479a0cee8605f8bd35d.png) ## Join us on Discord! ### Credits - TripleHeadedSheep 3D Models - RazzleberryFox Coding/3D Models - ProfMobius Coding - Momoko Coding/3D Models - PhiiDelity Social Media Manager ## Check Out Our Other Mods! [![Decocraft Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92baabe1858b9d26f922f0eb57453b70807718c1.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/decocraft) ### Partnered with Essential [![Two minecraft players and 2 sheep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2f1ca75ef5ed3453dafced0599fc4c0d53137f0.png)](https://essential.gg/x/decocraft)
